__fixture__.name: repair_card_mirror_only_docs_refresh
__fixture__.scenario: Mirror-only posture repair card. The transport posture carries mirror_route_class = mirror_only_no_direct_allowed and offline_or_deny_all_state = online_mirror_only with a non-null mirror_endpoint_ref and mirror_snapshot_ref. The card refreshes the local docs pack through the active mirror; no direct-origin path is attempted. Scope is scope_local_only because the change lands in the local docs pack cache; authority is user_local_authority; consent is no_consent_required_safe_default. The card cites the mirror-snapshot evidence and names the mirror in where_it_applies_sentence so the user can see why the path is mirror-bound rather than direct.
contract_sections: Offline, mirror-only, and deny-all examples remain explicit

title_label_text: Refresh local docs pack from active mirror
what_changes_sentence: Pulls a fresh docs-pack snapshot through the active org mirror and writes it to the local docs cache; the direct-origin path remains refused under the mirror-only posture.
where_it_applies_sentence: Applies only to the local docs cache on this device, fetched through the customer-operated mirror named on the posture; no remote target, managed provider, or policy bundle is touched.

evidence_links.evidence_note: Posture object naming mirror_only_no_direct_allowed with the active mirror endpoint and snapshot.
Attribution showing the prior docs-refresh attempt routed through the mirror endpoint.
